title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is an innovative demo built with Flutter and Firebase that uses Gemini and agentic features to generate dynamic, personalized user images for latte printing. The app demonstrates Agent-to-UI (A2UI) technology enabling real-time co-creation of tailored customer experiences.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video breaks down GenLatte, a demo app built with Flutter and Firebase that uses Gemini and agentic features to generate personalized images for latte printing. The walkthrough centers on Agent-to-UI (A2UI) technology, which enables real-time co-creation of tailored customer experiences. The takeaway is a concrete look at how agent orchestration and generative AI combine in a working application: Gemini produces dynamic, personalized imagery while the agentic layer drives the interface during creation.
